brionna jones.comment: Jones (knee) is probable for Sunday's game against Chicago.

te-hina paopao.comment: Paopao (leg) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Sky.

skylar diggins.comment: Head coach Tyler Marsh said Tuesday that Diggins (knee) is without a timetable for a return, Alissa Hirsh of the Chicago Sun-Times reports.

dijonai carrington.comment: Carrington (foot) will remain on the inactive list for Sunday's game against the Aces.

rickea jackson.comment: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

aneesah morrow.comment: Morrow (reconditioning) is listed as questionable for Sunday's game against the Mercury.

brittney griner.comment: Griner is probable for Sunday's game in Phoenix due to a rib injury.

saniya rivers.comment: Rivers (ankle) is probable for Sunday's game in Phoenix.

aaliyah edwards.comment: Edwards is listed as probable for Sunday's game against the Mercury due to a right knee injury.

alanna smith.comment: Smith (leg) is doubtful for Sunday's game against the Sparks.

miela sowah.comment: Sowah (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against Washington.

ashten prechtel.comment: Prechtel (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against Washington.

juste jocyte.comment: Jocyte is out for Saturday's game against the Mystics due to left foot soreness.

iliana rupert.comment: Rupert is pregnant, and the Valkyries have filed for a replacement contract ahead of the 2026 season, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports Thursday.

kiana williams.comment: Williams (hand) is listed as probable for Sunday's game against the Wings.

kelsey plum.comment: Plum has suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com reports.

janiah barker.comment: Barker (leg) will be sidelined for the rest of the 2026 season, Callie Fin of USA Today reports.

ta'niya latson.comment: Latson (coach's decision) won't play Sunday against the Fever.

kierstan bell.comment: Bell has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Fever due to a right leg injury.

liatu king.comment: King (coach's decision) is out for Saturday's game versus Portland.

napheesa collier.comment: Collier (ankle) has been cleared to resume practices with the Lynx, the team announced Wednesday.

emma cechova.comment: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

marine johannes.comment: Johannes (ankle) exited Saturday's 108-88 loss to the Fever in the fourth quarter and did not return, finishing with 12 points (4-12 FG, 4-11 3Pt), two rebounds, one assist and one steal in 18 minutes.

leonie fiebich.comment: Fiebich (foot) currently doesn't have a timetable to return, Jackie Powell of The IX Sports reports.

natasha mack.comment: Mack (foot) is listed as probable for Sunday's game against the Sun.

sami whitcomb.comment: Whitcomb (knee) is probable for Sunday's game versus the Sun.

jovana nogic.comment: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.

karlie samuelson.comment: Samuelson (finger) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Lynx.

holly winterburn.comment: Winterburn is out for Saturday's game versus Minnesota due to personal reasons.

megan gustafson.comment: Gustafson (personal) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Lynx.

sania feagin.comment: Feagin (knee) was diagnosed with a torn left ACL on Thursday and will miss the rest of the 2026 campaign, WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland reports.

taina mair.comment: Mair (coach's decision) is listed out for Friday's game against Indiana.

ezi magbegor.comment: Magbegor (face) was diagnosed with a facial fracture and will be "reevaluated in the next couple of weeks," Percy Allen of the Seattle Times reports.

brittney sykes.comment: Head coach Sandy Brondello said Thursday that Sykes (foot) has taken part in individual work at practice recently, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports.

kiki rice.comment: Head coach Sandy Brondello said Thursday that Rice (ankle) has progressed to doing non-contact work at practice but is doubtful to return before the All-Star break, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet reports.
